description: R08 - Loss Accounts Analysis for Actuarial - Detail

sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (GL = '4498000' or GL >= '6000000') and substring(CC,4,1) <> 'C' and substring(CC,4,1) <> 'H'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'FX-Adj' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('990','991','992','993')
update TransX set Flex1 = 'Purch/Sale' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY in ('810','815')
update TransX set Flex1 = 'non-FX' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, TP,PC,BusCat, Contract,UWYR,Flex1, Amt1,Amt2,RefKey2) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, TP,PC,BusCat, Contract,UWYR, Flex1, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt1)-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, 'pass2' as RefKey2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, TP,PC,BusCat,Contract,UWYR, Flex1)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RefKey2 is NULL

update TransX set RefKey2 = '1. Gross', Flex3 = 'Balance Sheet', Flex4 = 'Paid', Flex5 = 'ULAE', Flex6 = 'Americas', RefKey3 = 'US Branch', RefKey1 = 'no', BusCatDesc = '', Tpname = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set RefKey2 = '2. Ceded' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) = '14' or BusCat like '3%')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'Income Statement' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '4000000'
update TransX set Flex4 = 'IBNR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,3) in ('143','145','203','205') or GL = '2040001')
update TransX set Flex4 = 'Case' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '3000000' and Flex4 = 'Paid'
update TransX set Flex4 = 'Change in IBNR' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,3) in ('533','535')
update TransX set Flex4 = 'Change in Case' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(GL,1,2) = '53' and Flex4 = 'Paid'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'ALAE' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,3) in ('144','204','534') or GL like '51%')
update TransX set Flex5 = 'Loss' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,3) in ('141','142','143','201','202','203','531','532','533') or GL like '50%' or GL = '2040001')
update TransX set RefKey1 = 'yes' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(PC,1,1) = '6'
update TransX set CCdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.Co = c.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set PCdesc = p.Descr, Division = p.Division, Region = p.Region, Location = p.Location, Zone = p.Zone, Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = p.Name from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set FSitem = f.FSitem, FSitemDesc = f.FSitemDesc from TransX t inner join Fsitems f on t.GL >= f.FromGL and t.GL <= ThruGL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCatDesc = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.BusCat = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat <> '' and Table_ID = 'BusCat'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'US Insurance Ops', RefKey3 = 'US Insurance Ops' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division = 'US_INS_OPS'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'EuroAsia', RefKey3 = 'Europe' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Division = 'EUROASIA' and Region =  'EUROPE') or (Division = 'FIRV' and Region =  'EUR_FIRV'))
update TransX set Flex6 = 'EuroAsia', RefKey3 = 'Asia' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Division = 'EUROASIA' and Region =  'ASIA') or (Division = 'FIRV' and Region =  'SNG_FIRV'))

update TransX set Flex6 = 'London Market', RefKey3 = 'London Branch' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Division = 'LONDON_MKT' and Region =  'LONBRANCH') or (Division = 'FIRV' and Region =  'LB_FIRV'))
update TransX set Flex6 = 'London Market', RefKey3 = 'Newline' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division = 'LONDON_MKT' and Region =  'NEWLN'

update TransX set Flex6 = 'Americas', RefKey3 = 'Canada Branch' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Division = 'Americas' and Location =  'CAN') or (Division = 'FIRV' and Region =  'CA_FIRV'))
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Americas', RefKey3 = 'Latin America' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Division = 'LATAMER' or (Division = 'FIRV' and Region =  'LAFIRV'))
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Americas', RefKey3 = 'US Branch' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ((Division = 'Americas' and Location =  'USA') or (Division = 'FIRV' and Region =  'USR_FIRV'))
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Americas', RefKey3 = 'Miscellaneous' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Division = 'Americas' and Region = 'AMER_MISC'
update TransX set Flex6 = 'Americas', RefKey3 = 'US Branch' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex6 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = m.Field1 + ' ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Hierarchy = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and ID = 'Hierarchy'

update TransX set Flex2 = m.Field1 + ' ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Zone = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and ID = 'Hierarchy' and Flex2 is NULL and t.Zone <> ''

update TransX set Flex2 = m.Field1 + ' ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Location = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and ID = 'Hierarchy' and Flex2 is NULL and t.Location <> ''

update TransX set Flex2 = m.Field1 + ' ' + m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Region = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'DACanalysis' and ID = 'Hierarchy' and Flex2 is NULL and t.Region <> ''
update TransX set Flex2 = Division + ' ' + Hierarchy from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 is NULL
update TransX set Flex2 = Flex2 + ' FIRV' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Hierarchy like '%FIRV'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR) (select KeyID + '-data2', '1. Beginning Balance' as Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt2,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt2 <> 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR) (select KeyID + '-data2', '2. Incurred Losses' as Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Flex4 like 'Change in %' or Flex4 = 'Paid'))

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR) (select KeyID + '-data2', '3. Paid Losses' as Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex4 = 'Paid')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR) (select KeyID + '-data2', '4. FX Impact' as Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'FX-Adj')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR) (select KeyID + '-data2', '5. Acq/Divest' as Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'Purch/Sale')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR) (select KeyID + '-data2', '6. Ending Balance' as Flex3,FSitem,FSitemDesc,Flex4,Flex5,Co,CCdesc,GL,GLdesc,TPname,BusCat,BusCatDesc,RefKey2,PC,Flex6,RefKey3,PCdesc,Amt1,Flex1,RefKey1,Hierarchy,Flex2,Contract,UWYR from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 = 'Balance Sheet')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Amt1,0) = 0 and coalesce(Amt2,0) = 0

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Co, GL, TP,PC,CC,BusCat,TTY, Contract,UWYR,Amt2,Amt1) values ('[batchID]',[Yr],
